name: Exfiltration Over Symmetric Encrypted Non-C2 Protocol
description: Detects data exfiltration using encrypted channels outside normal C2
query:
// Detect encrypted exfiltration over non-standard ports
// Trigger on large outbound data over unusual encrypted channels
events from ndr_flow
where destination_port not in (80, 443, 22, 25, 53)
  and bytes_sent > 5000000
  and protocol = "TCP"
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 2
within 600 seconds
